arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ دَرَجَاتِنَا وَسَهِّلْ أُمُورَنَا وَاشْفِ مَرْضَانَا جَمِيعاً
latinTransliteration: Allāhumma-rfa‘ darajātinā wa sahhil umūranā wa-shfi marḍānā jamī‘ā
englishTranslation: O Allah, elevate our degrees, ease our affairs, and heal all of our sick.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga yékkati sunu màkka, yombal sunuy mbir, te saafara sunuy tawat.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ يِيكَّتِ سُنُ مَكَّ يُومْبَلْ سُنُيْ مْبِرْ تِ سَافَرَ سُنُيْ تchart

arabicText: وَأَنْزِلِ الْبَرَكَةَ وَالسَّكِينَةَ فِي دِيَارِنَا وَاحْفَظْ أَوْلَادَنَا مِنَ السُّوءِ
latinTransliteration: Wa anzilil-barakata was-sakīnate fī diyārinā wa-ḥfaẓ awlādanā minas-sū'
englishTranslation: And send down blessing and tranquility in our homes and protect our children from evil.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te sotti barke ak jam ca sunuy kër, te aar sunuy doom ci bépp lëndëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سُتِّ بَرْكِ اَكْ جَمْ سِ سُنُيْ كِࣺرْ تِ آرْ سُنُيْ دُومْ سِ بِيقْ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ

arabicText: يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ نَسْأَلُكَ الْقَبُولَ وَحُسْنَ الْخَاتِمَةِ يَوْمَ الرَّحِيلِ
latinTransliteration: Yā Dhal-Jalāli wal-Ikrāmi nas'alukal-qabūla wa ḥusnal-khātimati yawmar-raḥīl
englishTranslation: O Possessor of Majesty and Honor, we ask You for acceptance and a beautiful end on the day of departure.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom ndam ak ngënel, noongi lay ñaan nangu ak dee gu rafet ca bisu dee.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ نْدَمْ اَكْ نْجِࣺنِلْ نُونْجِ لَيْ نْيَانْ نَنْجُ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ بِسُ دِ

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ آخِرَ كَلَامِنَا شَهَادَةَ الْحَقِّ بِالْإِخْلَاصِ وَالْيَقِينِ التَّامِّ
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al ākhira kalāminā shahādatel-ḥaqqi bil-ikhlāṣi wal-yaqīnit-tāmm
englishTranslation: And make our last words the testimony of truth with sincerity and absolute certainty.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te def sunu wax yu jëkk mu nekk dëggal sa dund and ak sell ak dëgg dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفْ سُنُ وَخْ يُ جِࣺكْ مُ نِكَّ دِٜجَّلْ سَ دُنْدْ اَنْدْ اَكْ سِلْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ دَرَجَاتِنَا وَسَهِّلْ أُمُورَنَا وَاشْفِ مَرْضَانَا جَمِيعاً [5]
latinTransliteration: Allāhumma-rfa‘ darajātinā wa sahhil umūranā wa-shfi marḍānā jamī‘ā (5)
englishTranslation: O Allah, elevate our degrees, ease our affairs, and heal all of our sick. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga yékkati sunu màkka, yombal sunuy mbir, te saafara sunuy tawat. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ يِيكَّتِ سُنُ مَكَّ يُومْبَلْ سُنُيْ مْبِرْ تِ سَافَرَ سُنُيْ تchart [5]

latinTransliteration: Wa anzilil-barakata was-sakīnate fī diyārinā wa-ḥfaẓ awlādanā minas-sū' (6)
englishTranslation: And send down blessing and tranquility in our homes and protect our children from evil. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te sotti barke ak jam ca sunuy kër, te aar sunuy doom ci bépp lëndëm. (Wers 6)

latinTransliteration: Yā Dhal-Jalāli wal-Ikrāmi nas'alukal-qabūla wa ḥusnal-khātimati yawmar-raḥīl (7)
englishTranslation: O Possessor of Majesty and Honor, we ask You for acceptance and a beautiful end on the day of departure. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom ndam ak ngënel, noongi lay ñaan nangu ak dee gu rafet ca bisu dee. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ نْدَمْ اَكْ نْجِࣺنِلْ نُونْجِ لَيْ نْيَانْ نَنْجُ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ بِسُ دِ [7]

latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al ākhira kalāminā shahādatel-ḥaqqi bil-ikhlāṣi wal-yaqīnit-tāmm (8)
englishTranslation: And make our last words the testimony of truth with sincerity and absolute certainty. (Stanza 8)

wolofTranslationStandard: Te def sunu wax yu jëkk mu nekk dëggal sa dund and ak sell ak dëgg dëgg. (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفْ سُنُ وَخْ يُ جِࣺكْ مُ نِكَّ دِٜجَّلْ سَ دُنْدْ اَنْدْ اَكْ سِلْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [24]

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ دَرَجَاتِنَا وَسَهِّلْ أُمُورَنَا وَاشْفِ مَرْضَانَا جَمِيعاً [25]
latinTransliteration: Allāhumma-rfa‘ darajātinā wa sahhil umūranā wa-shfi marḍānā jamī‘ā (25)
englishTranslation: O Allah, elevate our degrees, ease our affairs, and heal all of our sick. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga yékkati sunu màkka, yombal sunuy mbir, te saafara sunuy tawat. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ يِيكَّتِ سُنُ مَكَّ يُومْبَلْ سُنُيْ مْبِرْ تِ سَافَرَ سُنُيْ تchart [25]

arabicText: وَأَنْزِلِ الْبَرَكَةَ وَالسَّكِينَةَ فِي دِيَارِنَا وَاحْفَظْ أَوْلَادَنَا مِنَ السُّوءِ [26]
latinTransliteration: Wa anzilil-barakata was-sakīnate fī diyārinā wa-ḥfaẓ awlādanā minas-sū' (26)
englishTranslation: And send down blessing and tranquility in our homes and protect our children from evil. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te sotti barke ak jam ca sunuy kër, te aar sunuy doom ci bépp lëndëm. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ سُتِّ بَرْكِ اَكْ جَمْ سِ سُنُيْ كِࣺرْ تِ آرْ سُنُيْ دُومْ سِ بِيقْ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ [26]

arabicText: يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ نَسْأَلُكَ الْقَبُولَ وَحُسْنَ الْخَاتِمَةِ يَوْمَ الرَّحِيلِ [27]
latinTransliteration: Yā Dhal-Jalāli wal-Ikrāmi nas'alukal-qabūla wa ḥusnal-khātimati yawmar-raḥīl (27)
englishTranslation: O Possessor of Majesty and Honor, we ask You for acceptance and a beautiful end on the day of departure. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yaw Boroom ndam ak ngënel, noongi lay ñaan nangu ak dee gu rafet ca bisu dee. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: يَوْ بُرُومْ نْدَمْ اَكْ نْجِࣺنِلْ نُونْجِ لَيْ نْيَانْ نَنْجُ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ بِسُ دِ [27]

arabicText: وَاجْعَلْ آخِرَ كَلَامِنَا شَهَادَةَ الْحَقِّ بِالْإِخْلَاصِ وَالْيَقِينِ التَّامِّ [28]
latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al ākhira kalāminā shahādatel-ḥaqqi bil-ikhlāṣi wal-yaqīnit-tāmm (28)
englishTranslation: And make our last words the testimony of truth with sincerity and absolute certainty. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te def sunu wax yu jëkk mu nekk dëggal sa dund and ak sell ak dëgg dëgg. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دِفْ سُنُ وَخْ يُ جِࣺكْ مُ نِكَّ دِٜجَّلْ سَ دُنْدْ اَنْدْ اَكْ سِلْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [28]

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ ارْفَعْ دَرَجَاتِنَا وَسَهِّلْ أُمُورَنَا وَاشْفِ مَرْضَانَا جَمِيعاً [29]
latinTransliteration: Allāhumma-rfa‘ darajātinā wa sahhil umūranā wa-shfi marḍānā jamī‘ā (29)
englishTranslation: O Allah, elevate our degrees, ease our affairs, and heal all of our sick. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga yékkati sunu màkka, yombal sunuy mbir, te saafara sunuy tawat. (Wers 29)

latinTransliteration: Wa anzilil-barakata was-sakīnate fī diyārinā wa-ḥfaẓ awlādanā minas-sū' (30)

wolofTranslationStandard: Te sotti barke ak jam ca sunuy kër, te aar sunuy doom ci bépp lëndëm. (Wers 30)

latinTransliteration: Yā Dhal-Jalāli wal-Ikrāmi nas'alukal-qabūla wa ḥusnal-khātimati yawmar-raḥīl (31)

latinTransliteration: Wa-j‘al ākhira kalāminā shahādatel-ḥaqqi bil-ikhlāṣi wal-yaqīnit-tāmm (32)
